home.title: Hi, I'm Fernando
home.headline: Product Builder & Full Stack Developer
home.subheadline: End-to-end web products, from first sketch to launch.
home.intro: Design, full-stack engineering and a product mindset — so what I build actually moves the business.

softSkills.title: Beyond the code
softSkills.systems: Systems thinking: processes and digital flows
softSkills.focus: Focused on conversion, growth and scale
softSkills.teamwork: At ease with both technical and non-technical teams

values.collaborateText: I work side by side with founders and teams who have a clear vision — listening, suggesting, building together.
values.productText: I don't just ship code. I care about the experience, the business value, and what comes next.
values.aiText: I use AI to ship faster and smarter — not to replace craft, but to amplify it.

items.name: CRM Health Fitness
items.shortDescription: Complete CRM for client management in the fitness industry.
items.fullDescription: CRM system developed for comprehensive client management in gyms and personal training centers. Includes dashboard with metrics, client tracking, performance analytics and training plan management.

items.name: Parent Fit
items.shortDescription: Online academy for busy parents who want to get fit.
items.fullDescription: Platform built in Next.js offering routines, videos and fitness resources tailored to families with limited time.

items.name: WellnessReal
items.fullDescription: Professional fitness platform with personalized plans, nutrition and osteopathy. Mobile app with videos, progress tracking and weekly adjustments.

items.name: Caservi
items.fullDescription: Corporate landing page using HTML, CSS and pure JavaScript. Showcases installation and minor renovation services.

items.name: CodeConnect
items.fullDescription: Next.js + TypeScript project for a startup. Clean UI, modular sections, process automation explained and contact form via Nodemailer.

items.name: DR Nutrición
items.fullDescription: Professional website for a clinical nutrition and digestive pathology specialist. Personalized follow-up plans, specialties, patient testimonials and direct contact system.

items.name: Antea Salud
items.shortDescription: In-home training and rehabilitation for seniors.
items.fullDescription: Professional landing for a gerontology and in-home physical rehabilitation service. Human-centered approach with testimonials, plan comparison and guided contact form.

items.name: Caniches con Amor
items.shortDescription: Consulting and community for poodle lovers.
items.fullDescription: Website for a specialized poodle advisor. Consulting services, responsible breeding info, premium community and trusted breeder connections.

items.name: Escapa Cantabria
items.fullDescription: Website showcasing fleet, prices and reservations. Clean layout with mobile-friendly navigation.
